title: Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals
shortDescription: Tax planning, statutory audit, trust tax compliance, pharmaceutical GST, and capital expenditure financial controls for healthcare institutions.
fullDescription: Hospitals, medical chains, diagnostic networks, and pharmaceutical manufacturers operate in a heavily regulated environment governed by specific tax provisions, trust laws, and GST exemption matrices. S.G. & Associates delivers targeted accounting, tax audit, and governance services for healthcare organizations, medical practitioners, and pharma entities.
keyChallenges: Navigating complex GST exemption rules on healthcare services versus taxable medicines and implants
Section 11/12/10(23C) trust taxation compliance for charitable and non-profit healthcare institutions
High capital expenditure depreciation scheduling and medical equipment lease accounting
TDS compliance on professional payments to consulting doctors (Section 194J) and staff
tailoredSolutions: Structuring pharmacy retail vs. hospital service billing to maintain full GST compliance
Form 10B/10BB tax audit compilation for registered medical trusts and research foundations
Fixed asset register compilation and depreciation verification for medical diagnostics machinery
Doctor contract classification and Section 194J quarterly TDS audit procedures

caseStudy.title: Tax Audit & Section 10(23C) Trust Compliance for 100-Bed Multi-Specialty Hospital
caseStudy.context: A charitable healthcare trust operating a multi-specialty hospital required annual tax audit under Form 10B, trust income accumulation compliance, and doctor TDS audit.
caseStudy.approach: S.G. & Associates conducted a complete audit of trust income applications, verified Section 11(2) accumulation filings (Form 10), and audited doctor retentions.
caseStudy.outcome: Successfully secured Form 10B audit certification and ensured complete tax exemption status retention for the trust.
